title: cyclobalanus daphnoidea
intro: Cyclobalanus daphnoidea, also known as Taiwan yew, is a species of flowering plant in the cypress family (Cupressaceae) native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant's extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Cyclobalanus daphnoidea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine.
